name: Kristopher Moldovan
background: Mr. Moldovan has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Treasurer from 2017 to 2022. He joined the company in 2006 and has held various leadership roles in finance and legal.

commpanies.name: Vistra Corp.
commpanies.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
